validation_results.test_output_summary: 32 tests passed in 25.24s covering tasks 010 (ephemeral_pg fixture), 011 (injection safety, embed failures, search boundaries), and 012 (metadata filter, concurrent writes). All quality gates passed.
validation_results.code_quality: All quality gates passed. Evidence gathering completed successfully (gathering_status: complete). Honesty score 1.0 with only minor should_fix reporting inconsistencies from task-work delegation pattern. No critical violations.
edge_cases_covered: Concurrent same-key writes with distinct content lengths and version markers
Read-during-write atomicity across 50 polling iterations for both aget and asearch
Metadata filtering preserving semantic ranking and scores
Parallel fixture isolation via UUID-based compose projects and random ports

criteria_verification.notes: Test test_metadata_filter_scopes_to_project_preserving_ranking exists and passes. Creates memories for project_a and project_b, validates asearch with filter={'project': 'project_a'} returns only project_a memories while preserving semantic ranking and scores.

Test test_concurrent_same_key_writes_converge_on_one_winner exists and passes. Uses asyncio.gather for two concurrent aput calls with distinct content lengths and version markers to detect partial writes. Validates convergence on exactly one complete version.

Tests test_read_during_write_observes_complete_version_only and test_asearch_during_concurrent_writes_returns_complete_items exist and pass. Validate readers polling aget/asearch during concurrent writes observe only complete OLD or complete NEW versions across 50 iterations, never blends.

Full integration suite passed: 32 tests in 25.24s covering tasks 010 (ephemeral_pg fixture), 011 (injection safety, embed failures, search boundaries), and 012 (metadata filter, concurrent writes). Command: python -m pytest tests/integration/ -m integration -v --timeout=120. No failures.

Hermeticity verified: grep -riE 'synology|nas_host|100.64.' tests/integration/ --exclude-dir=__pycache__ | grep -v 'for forbidden in' returns no output. Only matches are test assertions in test_store_semantics.py validating absence of these strings. No actual NAS references in DSNs, config, or connection strings.

Parallel isolation documented in tests/integration/conftest.py lines 12-29. Documentation explains UUID-based Docker Compose project names (fleet_memory_test_{uuid8}), random port allocation via _get_random_port(), independent database instances, manual verification instructions, and expected behavior. Criterion explicitly allows documentation for manual-or-CI checks.

rationale: All 6 acceptance criteria verified with independent evidence. Evidence gathering completed successfully (gathering_status: complete) - major improvement from Turn 1's partial_honesty_abort. All quality gates passed. 32 integration tests passed covering metadata filtering, concurrent write convergence, read-during-write atomicity, hermeticity, and parallel isolation. Honesty score 1.0 - the 5 should_fix discrepancies are minor reporting inconsistencies (Player listed test files that exist but weren't modified this turn due to task-work delegation pattern). No critical violations, no absent signals, no zero-cardinality oracles. Work is complete and verified.
